contexts.context: ...and refined. Criticism has become more profound. <mark>Essay-writing</mark> has been largely cultivated. Moral sentiments of weight...
...now be thought much above the common run of <mark>essay-writers</mark> in a newspaper or a magazine. Many inaccuracies...
.... Perhaps the obligations of the Poet to the <mark>Essay-writer</mark> are not sufficiently adverted to, the latter being only...
